name: Genenta Science S.p.A.
description: Genenta Science S.p.A. is a clinical-stage biotechnology company pioneering the development of lentivirus-based gene therapies for cancer. The company's proprietary platform, Temferon, is designed to deliver immunotherapeutic agents directly into the tumor microenvironment, minimizing systemic toxicity while maximizing therapeutic efficacy. Genenta is primarily focused on treating solid tumors, including glioblastoma multiforme and other high-risk cancers, by leveraging genetically engineered hematopoietic stem and progenitor cells.
